question: What is the title and purchase price of the book that has the highest total order amount?
sql: SELECT Book.Title, Book.PurchasePrice FROM Book JOIN Books_Order ON Book.ISBN = Books_Order.ISBN GROUP BY Book.ISBN ORDER BY SUM(Books_Order.amount) DESC LIMIT 1;

back_translation.intent: 获取书籍信息及其对应的订单数量

semantic.reason: 原始问题要求获取总订单金额最高的书的标题和购买价格，但SQL反向翻译描述中order_by使用了Books_Order.amount单个字段而非总金额聚合值，且未体现必要的分组（group_by）和聚合（agg）操作。
